books.title: The Dying Sun
books.author: Garrett Peterson
books.description: In Vantera, a hunted Light manipulator may doom the city, forcing unlikely allies to question sacrifice, faith, and whether the Order is right.

books.title: Whispers of the Hollow Vale
books.author: Maris Elowen
books.description: Strange voices echo through the vale, calling a young healer into a hidden world of spirits, secrets, and ancient magic.

books.title: The Clockmaker’s Oath
books.author: Jonas Keld
books.description: A master clockmaker binds time itself to save his city, but every second he steals brings him closer to ruin.

books.title: Stormbound Legends
books.author: Kaelin Dross
books.description: Warriors chosen by the storm must unite against a rising darkness that threatens to swallow the skies.

books.title: The Ember Witch
books.author: Selene Arkwright
books.description: Marked by flame and feared by all, a young witch must embrace her power to stop a kingdom from burning.

books.title: Veil of the Forgotten King
books.author: Darian Holt
books.description: A lost king returns from myth, but the truth behind his legend may destroy the realm he once ruled.

books.title: Silverblade Rebellion
books.author: Talia Vire
books.description: An underground rebellion rises against a tyrant, led by a warrior wielding a blade said to cut through fate itself.

books.title: The Glass Sea
books.author: Orin Vale
books.description: Sailing across a sea turned to glass, a crew of outcasts seeks a cure for a curse that has frozen the world.

books.title: Runes of the Last Guardian
books.author: Eldra Morn
books.description: The last guardian of an ancient order must decipher forbidden runes before a sealed evil awakens.

books.title: A Kingdom Beneath Ice
books.author: Freya Norlund
books.description: Beneath a frozen wasteland lies a hidden kingdom, and a secret that could reshape the surface world forever.

books.title: Lanterns of Evernight
books.author: Calem Thorne
books.description: In a city where night never ends, enchanted lanterns hold back creatures lurking in the dark.

books.title: Crown of the Starfallen
books.author: Lyra Quen
books.description: A fallen star grants power to a reluctant queen, but using it may cost her everything she holds dear.

books.title: The Bone Archivist
books.author: Marek Solis
books.description: A keeper of forbidden relics uncovers a conspiracy buried in bones and shadow.

books.title: Echoes of the Sunforge
books.author: Riven Kael
books.description: Forged in celestial fire, a legendary weapon resurfaces, drawing heroes and villains into a race for its power.

books.title: The Ashen Crown
books.author: Elric Vantor
books.description: When a fallen prince discovers a crown forged in dragonfire, he must reclaim a shattered kingdom before the ashes consume everything.
